title: Tapping to welcome property and investment
subtitle: A tapping practice for clearing the fear around big property or investment decisions.
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 47 of the MONEY program. The script works with the belief that the best deals are already taken, or that your judgment isn't good enough for large decisions.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you're researching or considering a property or investment and the dominant feeling is that it won't work out or isn't for someone like you.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 47 of the MONEY program. The script works with the specific fear around property and investment: that the good deals are gone, that you'd miss the hidden problems, that negotiating from confidence is something other people do.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I've feared big property or investment decisions, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've doubted I'd find great deals, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I thought those opportunities were rare, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I used to think the best properties were taken.
**Side of eye:** I worried I'd miss the right timing.
**Under eye:** I feared hidden problems in deals.
**Under nose:** I felt unsure of my negotiating skills.
**Chin:** I sometimes settled for less.
**Collarbone:** I'm ready to trust bigger opportunities.
**Under arm:** I allow great investments to appear.
**Top of head:** I welcome high-value properties and assets.
Reframe to positive (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I attract outstanding investment deals.
**Side of eye:** The perfect properties come to me easily.
**Under eye:** I trust my judgment and my team.
**Under nose:** I love building wealth through smart buys.
**Chin:** I'm open to both commercial and residential success.
**Collarbone:** I enjoy the freedom investments create.
**Under arm:** I welcome lucrative, secure opportunities.
**Top of head:** I invest wisely and prosper.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
Adapted from Day 47 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). EFT tapping developed by Gary Craig in the 1990s.
